game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept: **异常;** "异常" is a single-player puzzle game where players program the AI of robotic units to complete level objectives. In each sequential level, players interact with a visual programming interface, dragging and dropping command blocks or inputting code snippets to define robot behaviors such as "move forward 3 units," "attack nearest enemy," or "wait 2 seconds." After programming, players tap a "Run Simulation" button to observe their robots execute the AI, with success determined by eliminating all enemies or reaching a designated exit point. Progression involves unlocking new levels that introduce additional robot types, environmental hazards, and increasingly complex enemy patterns, requiring players to craft sophisticated AI programs for multiple units to cooperate. Difficulty scales by increasing the number of robots to manage, the intricacy of required AI logic, and the precision needed in command sequencing, with failure occurring if any robot is destroyed or the objective is not met.
game_info.description: Program robotic units to complete mission objectives! In each level, you'll code AI behaviors for your robots using simple commands. Once programmed, execute the simulation and watch your robots follow your instructions to eliminate enemies or reach the exit. Success requires strategic thinking and precise programming across increasingly complex scenarios.
game_info.controls:
Arrow Keys: Navigate through command menus and select commands
Space: Confirm command selection / Add command to sequence
Shift: Delete last command from sequence
Z: Execute simulation (run programmed AI)
Enter: Start game from title screen
ESC: Pause/Unpause game
R: Restart to title screen

TEST_1.test_description: Tests basic movement and command programming. Validates that robots can be programmed with simple movement commands and execute them correctly. Ensures the UI responds to inputs and commands are added to the sequence properly.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Select basic movement commands (MOVE_FORWARD) and execute them. Test navigation through the command menu using arrow keys and space to confirm selections. Verify that commands are added to the robot's program queue.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: Robot should successfully execute movement commands. The programming interface should respond correctly to inputs. Commands should be added and removed from the sequence as expected. The simulation should run without errors.

TEST_2.test_description: Tests winning strategy by programming robots to complete level objectives. Implements optimal AI programming to eliminate all enemies or reach the exit point. Validates that the win condition is properly triggered.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Analyze the current level layout and enemy positions. Program robots with optimal command sequences including movement, rotation, and attack commands. Execute the simulation and verify robots successfully complete the objective within the time limit.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: Robots execute programmed commands flawlessly. All enemies are eliminated or the exit is reached. Game transitions to GAME_OVER_WIN state. Final score reflects successful completion with appropriate metrics.
